plan_metadata.name: Sample Data Analyst Agent Playground Debug

steps.description: Click on the search input field within the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to activate it for text entry.
Type text 'data-analyst-agent' into the "Search" input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button next to the "Data Visualization Adaptive" sample in the "Featured samples" list within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit panel in Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:data-analyst-agent-v2}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Type a message..." input box at the bottom left of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application to begin entering a chat message.
Type the text "Annual sales from 2020-2022?" into the chat input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
Press the Enter key in the chat input box of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application after typing "Annual sales from 2020-2022?" to submit the query to the Data Analyst Agent.
@assertion bot has responsed user's question and without any error content.
